pre_game.message: Hey, I'm B. It’s a bit surreal being in here with everyone, isn't it? What's your name?
Hey B, I'm F. It definitely feels surreal, like we're all just waiting for the other shoe to drop.
I feel that. I'm just trying to stay focused on the prize—I've got people at home counting on me. What about you, what's your motivation?
Same here. I've got people I care about counting on me too, so I'm pretty determined to walk away with that prize.
I totally get that. It makes the pressure feel a bit heavier, doesn't it? Any idea what kind of game we're actually in for?
It definitely does. I haven't heard any specifics yet, but with a "shared prize pool," I'm guessing there's going to be some pressure on how we decide to split it—or not.
That "or not" is the part that worries me. I'd like to think we can all play fair, but money makes people unpredictable. Do you usually trust your gut with new people?
I usually do, but with this much on the line, I'm definitely keeping my guard up a bit more than usual. How about you?
I'm in the same boat. I'd love to trust everyone here, but I have too much to lose to not be careful.
I hear you. It’s a tough balance between being fair and doing what’s necessary for your family. I’m going to go see who else is here, but good luck.
Thanks, F. Good luck to you too. Let's hope we can both do right by our families.

post_game.message: Great coordination! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share and reached the best possible outcome.
Absolutely, it was a pleasure working together to ensure everyone got their fair share. I'm glad we achieved the optimal result.
